# Separator

Adds a visual or semantic boundary between related content.

## Installation

Add Separator from the configured StackTrace registry.

```shell
npx shadcn-vue@latest add @stacktrace/separator
```

## Usage

Separator is horizontal and decorative by default. Set `orientation="vertical"` inside a container with a defined height when dividing inline actions or metadata.

```vue
<template>
  <div>
    <div class="space-y-1">
      <p class="text-sm font-medium leading-none">
        Reka UI primitives
      </p>
      <p class="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
        Accessible Vue building blocks for design systems.
      </p>
    </div>
    <Separator class="my-4" />
    <div class="flex h-5 items-center space-x-4 text-sm">
      <div>Blog</div>
      <Separator orientation="vertical" />
      <div>Docs</div>
      <Separator orientation="vertical" />
      <div>Source</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Separator } from '@/Components/Separator'
</script>
```

## Decorative or semantic

Keep `decorative` enabled when nearby headings, grouping, or layout already communicates the structure. Set `:decorative="false"` only when the divider itself carries a meaningful boundary; Reka then exposes separator semantics and its orientation to assistive technology.

A separator should not replace a heading, list, landmark, or adequate whitespace. It has no label slot and does not create collapsible or resizable behavior.

## Responsive layout

Horizontal separators fill the available width. Vertical separators fill the parent's height, so place them in a row with an intentional height. When controls wrap on narrow screens, switch or remove a vertical divider rather than leaving a stray rule between rows.

## When to use

- Use Separator for a subtle boundary between neighboring regions of equal hierarchy.
- Use Marker's separator variant when a conversation or timeline needs a visible text label between rules.
- Use Resizable Handle when the boundary also changes panel size.

Hosted documentation: [Separator](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/separator)
